text_preview:
JUNE  2nd, 1989.

“São Paulo Regional Flight Protection Service.

COMMUNICATION RECORDING TRANSCRIPTION N.10 Tape. n. 21-A

REFERENCE: RD 46 / CRIP / 040589 SDOPV.

FROM 02 JUNE 1989

Parties involved: TAM573 and APP-SP

Transcription :

- 06: 28Z (TAM573) Control, Marília five seven three.

- (APP-SP) Five seven three, São Paulo, proceed

- (TAM573) Take off from Guarulhos, Bonsucesso climb.

- (APP-SP) Raise one six zero without restrictions, level reporting, three.

- (TAM573) Three. Ah, as soon as possible, do you authorize Bragança’s bow?

- (APP-SP) It’s authorized.

- (TAM573) Thank you
summary: On June 2, 1989, São Paulo ATC radar detected an intermittent unknown object near Americana-SP; TAM573 crew briefly sighted a greenish circular light ~50m in diameter below their aircraft.
